rules.Name: gitlab-ec2-stop-weekday
rules.Description: Stop GitLab EC2 at 10:00pm IST (16:30 UTC) Mon-Fri

rules.Name: gitlab-ec2-start-weekday
rules.Description: Start GitLab EC2 at 7:30am IST (02:00 UTC) Mon-Fri

rules.Name: gitlab-ec2-stop-weekend
rules.Description: Stop GitLab EC2 at 2:00pm IST (08:30 UTC) Saturday

rules.Name: gitlab-ec2-start-weekend
rules.Description: Start GitLab EC2 at 7:30am IST (02:00 UTC) Monday

notes.total_off_per_week: ~112.5 hrs vs 168 total = ~67% uptime -> ~33% billing reduction
